attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV.START_TV_DATETIME, N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV.END_TV_DATETIME, N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT, N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV.SS_CODE, N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV.SALES_ORDER_KEY, N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY, N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV WHERE N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME>=
(SELECT COALESCE(LAST_EXTRACT_DATE,CAST (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)))FROM $$CTLDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS
 WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_WI_SOL_EC_NEW_LINES')

SELECT 
ECNEW_LINES.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
NSOL_TGT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
NSOL_TGT.END_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE, 
NSOL_TGT.SS_CODE ,
NSOL_TGT.END_CUSTOMER_ASSGN_LEVEL, 
ECNEW_LINES.START_TV_DATETIME ,
ECNEW_LINES.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_SOL_EC_NEW_LINES ECNEW_LINES
INNER JOIN
(SELECT
WISOL_EC.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
NSOL_EC.END_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
NSOL_EC.END_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE, 
NSOL_EC.SS_CODE ,
NSOL_EC.END_CUSTOMER_ASSGN_LEVEL
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_SOL_EC_NEW_LINES_DIST WISOL_EC
INNER JOIN 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_END_CUSTOMER NSOL_EC
ON 
WISOL_EC.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOL_EC.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
AND
NSOL_EC.END_CUSTOMER_ASSGN_LEVEL = 'LINE'
) NSOL_TGT
ON
ECNEW_LINES.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOL_TGT.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY
WHERE 
NOT EXISTS
(SEL 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_END_CUSTOMER NSOL_3NF
WHERE ECNEW_LINES.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOL_3NF.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NSOL_3NF.END_CUSTOMER_ASSGN_LEVEL='LINE')
OR
NOT EXISTS 
(SEL 1 FROM $$WORKDB.WI_SOL_END_CUSTOMER WISOL_EC
WHERE ECNEW_LINES.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = WISOL_EC.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)

SELECT 
ECNEW_LINES.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
NSO_TGT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
NSO_TGT.DD_END_CUSTOMER_TYPE, 
NSO_TGT.SS_CD ,
NSO_TGT.END_CUSTOMER_ASSGN_LEVEL, 
ECNEW_LINES.START_TV_DATETIME ,
ECNEW_LINES.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_SOL_EC_NEW_LINES ECNEW_LINES
INNER JOIN
( SELECT
WISO_HDR.SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
NSO_EC.END_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
NSO_EC.DD_END_CUSTOMER_TYPE, 
NSO_EC.SS_CD ,
'HEADER' END_CUSTOMER_ASSGN_LEVEL
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_SOL_EC_HDR_DIST WISO_HDR
INNER JOIN 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SO_END_CUSTOMER NSO_EC
ON 
WISO_HDR.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO_EC.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
) NSO_TGT
ON
ECNEW_LINES.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO_TGT.SALES_ORDER_KEY
WHERE 
NOT EXISTS
(SEL 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_END_CUSTOMER NSOL_3NF
WHERE ECNEW_LINES.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOL_3NF.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NSOL_3NF.END_CUSTOMER_ASSGN_LEVEL = 'LINE')
OR
NOT EXISTS 
(SEL 1 FROM $$WORKDB.WI_SOL_END_CUSTOMER WISOL_EC
WHERE ECNEW_LINES.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = WISOL_EC.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
OR
NOT EXISTS 
(SEL 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_SOL_EC_PARENT_LINES WISOL_PL
WHERE ECNEW_LINES.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = WISOL_PL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)

SELECT
SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,         
END_CUSTOMER_KEY      ,        
END_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE ,       
SS_CODE                 ,      
END_CUSTOMER_ASSGN_LEVEL ,     
EDW_CREATE_DATETIME       ,    
RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_SOL_EC_PARENT_LINES
UNION 
SELECT
SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
END_CUSTOMER_KEY              ,
END_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE        ,
SS_CODE                       ,
END_CUSTOMER_ASSGN_LEVEL      ,
EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           ,
RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_SOL_EC_HEADERS
